name: get_callers
description: Return the list of symbols that call the given symbol, as resolved by the Jedi call graph. Use this to understand how a symbol is used in context and what higher-level code depends on it.

symbol.description: Fully qualified symbol name to look up callers for (e.g. 'module.ClassName.method_name'). Returns an empty list if the symbol has no known callers or was not resolved.
